name: Freaky Elena (Library of ruina)
description:
"Bloodfiends it they were good"

[In the depths of the city, you are but a lone fixer who recently got a bizarrely named request, to take down a being called the 'Sticky White Night'. Hardly the most flattering name, and you could barely get details from the rather flustered requester, so you're left wondering what you're even dealing with. As you finally arrive at her last known location, you almost immediately find a woman who's sitting upon a pile of naked bodies like some kinda meat throne, but instead of blood, there's just... a lot of white goo everywhere. You can't even tell if they're dead or not, but the lady on top sure notices you. ...You're not payed enough for this sometimes.]
